# fivenines_network_device (Resource)

Manages a FiveNines network device (SNMP monitoring).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# SNMPv2c device
resource "fivenines_network_device" "switch" {
  name            = "Core Switch"
  ip_address      = "192.168.1.1"
  device_type     = "switch"
  polling_interval = 60
  snmp_version    = "v2c"
  snmp_community  = "public"
}

# SNMPv3 device with auth+priv
resource "fivenines_network_device" "router" {
  name              = "Edge Router"
  ip_address        = "10.0.0.1"
  device_type       = "router"
  polling_interval  = 30
  snmp_version      = "v3"
  snmp_username     = "monitoring"
  snmp_security_level = "auth_priv"
  snmp_auth_protocol  = "sha"
  snmp_auth_password  = var.snmp_auth_password
  snmp_priv_protocol  = "aes"
  snmp_priv_password  = var.snmp_priv_password

  # Poll from a specific instance
  polling_host_id = fivenines_instance.poller.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_address` (String) IP address of the device.
- `name` (String) Name of the network device.
- `snmp_version` (String) SNMP version (v2c or v3).

### Optional

- `device_type` (String) Type of device (e.g., switch, router, firewall, other).
- `maintenance_mode` (Boolean) Whether the device is in maintenance mode.
- `polling_host_id` (String) UUID of the instance to poll from. If omitted, polling is done from the FiveNines cloud.
- `polling_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds (10-3600).
- `snmp_auth_password` (String, Sensitive) SNMPv3 authentication password. Write-only — not returned by the API.
- `snmp_auth_protocol` (String) SNMPv3 authentication protocol.
- `snmp_community` (String, Sensitive) SNMP community string (required for v2c). Write-only — not returned by the API.
- `snmp_priv_password` (String, Sensitive) SNMPv3 privacy password. Write-only — not returned by the API.
- `snmp_priv_protocol` (String) SNMPv3 privacy protocol.
- `snmp_security_level` (String) SNMPv3 security level.
- `snmp_username` (String, Sensitive) SNMPv3 username.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier (UUID).
- `last_polled_at` (String) Last poll timestamp.
- `model` (String) Detected model.
- `status` (String) Current status (up, down, unknown, unreachable).
- `sys_name` (String) SNMP sysName.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `vendor` (String) Detected vendor.
